name: Creamy Avocado with Bacon Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons bacon, crumbled (or imitation bacon bits)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit and peel the avocado.
2. Mash the mashed with a fork.
3. Blend in the lemon juice until well combined.
4. Add the sour cream and blend again until smooth.
5. Mix in the bacon (or imitation bacon bits), onion powder, hot sauce, and cucumber.
6. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 1/4 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Green bell pepper, bok choy, celery, pita bread, radishes, aged cheddar cheese, cheese crackers.
